🇪🇺

EUFilter — Age Verification Required

Operated under EU Regulation 1337/420 — Extremely Serious Internet Concerns Act

🏖️

Verification Pending

Your documents have been received. Unfortunately, Ursula von der Leyen — the only person authorised to approve verification requests — has gone on vacation. After years of being deeply concerned about things, she needed a break.

Verification requests will resume upon her return. No return date has been announced. She is deeply concerned about that too.

Reference: EUBVDO-VRF-
EUFilter v1.3.3.7 — EU Bureau of Vibes and Digital Oversight Regulation (EU) 1337/420  |  EUBVDO-GW-004
